text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: O-oh my gosh! What was that just now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's like my power's surging... I feel like I just got
way bigger!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
This is great! Now that I've gotten even bigger, I
can eat even more!
